92 _39AA EATG_ADMSN_CD (39Aa) Self-Care: Eating: Admission CHAR 2 A score indicating the patient's ability to eat at admission. Eating includes the ability to use suitable utensils to bring food to the mouth, as well as the ability to chew and swallow the food once the meal is presented in the customary manner on a table or tray. 00 = Activity did not occur, 01 = Helper - Complete
